# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_postgresqlflexibleserver (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the flexible server.
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group that contains the resource. You can obtain this value from the Azure Resource Manager API or the portal.

### Optional

- `administrator_login` (String) The administrator's login name of a server. Can only be specified when the server is being created (and is required for creation).
- `administrator_login_password` (String) The administrator login password (required for server creation).
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auth_config` (String) AuthConfig properties of a server.
- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone information of the server
- `backup` (String) Backup properties of a server.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cluster` (String) The elastic cluster properties of a server.
- `create_mode` (String) The mode to create a new PostgreSQL server.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fully_qualified_domain_name` (String) The fully qualified domain name of a server.
- `high_availability` (String) High availability properties of a server.
- `identity` (String) Identity for the Server.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `is_restart` (Boolean) Whether to restart the Post gresql server.
- `is_start` (Boolean) Whether to start the Post gresql server.
- `is_stop` (Boolean) Whether to stop the Post gresql server.
- `location` (String) Resource location. If not set, location from the resource group will be used as default.
- `maintenance_window` (String) Maintenance window properties of a server.
- `network` (String) Network properties of a server.
- `point_in_time_utc` (String) Restore point creation time (ISO8601 format), specifying the time to restore from. It's required when *create_mode=PointInTimeRestore*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sku` (String) The SKU (pricing tier) of the server.
- `source_server_resource_id` (String) The source server resource ID to restore from. It's required when *create_mode=PointInTimeRestore*
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the PostgreSQL Flexible server. Use `present` to create or update a server and `absent` to delete it.
- `storage` (String) Storage properties of a server.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `version` (String) PostgreSQL Server version.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `servers` (String) A list of dictionaries containing facts for PostgreSQL Flexible servers.
